title: Ricinocarpus macrostachyus

It belongs to the family Celastraceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the staff vine family. Within this family, Ricinocarpus macrostachyus is classified as a member of the genus Ricinocarpus. Further classification places it as a species within the order Celastrales, which is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions.
